title: HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: UMATILLA COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the federal and public housing programs including the Section 8 Housing Voucher program and manages several low-income apartment complexes. Listings of low-income properties, rural areas, and properties for agricultural workers. 155 SW Tenth Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: -Low-income households -Section 8: Income limits are 30% of median household income for the county (chart on website under public housing) -Programs prioritize families with children, older adults, and people with disabilities Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-12pm and 1pm-4pm, Wednesday 1pm-4pm Email (541) 567-3241 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-3241 TTY/TTD (800) 545-1833 ext 771 Toll-free (800) 221-6729 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Names of all adults and children living in the home -Valid photo ID for all adults -Birth certificates and social security cards for all members of the household LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Morrow, Umatilla, and Wheeler Counties Services: Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Public Housing Public Housing * Agricultural Laborers Rural Housing Development Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMATILLA COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY
